my-crypto-heroes.Description: My Crypto Heroes (MCH) is a Blockchain PRG game. Collect and train historical Heroes of the world and fight with them. All the time and passion you invest into the game will turn into real assets here. Get special and legendary items into your to equip, compose the ultimate unbeatable team formations and challenge epic battles to conquer the crypto world!

Cryptocurrency mining is the validation of transactions on the blockchain. Once validated, these transactions are added to the blockchain's public ledger of past transactions.
